faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Glendale?
faqs.answer: Cricket control services in Glendale typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and whether interior and exterior treatments are needed. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: What types of crickets are common in Glendale, Queens?
faqs.answer: Glendale homeowners most commonly encounter house crickets, field crickets, and camel crickets. House crickets are tan or brown and known for their loud chirping, while camel crickets are humpbacked, silent, and often found in basements and crawl spaces. Each species requires specific treatment approaches for effective control.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket problem in my Glendale home?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within one to two weeks. The timeline depends on infestation severity and species, but our technicians use professional-grade products and techniques that work faster than over-the-counter solutions.

faqs.question: Are cricket control treatments safe for my family and pets in Glendale?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to ensure all treatments are safe for your family and pets. Our technicians are trained in proper application techniques and will provide specific instructions for any necessary precautions. Most treatments allow for re-entry within a few hours of application.
